name: noname-custom-platform
description: Server-authoritative web platform for friend-room identity games and declarative custom content.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @sgs/game-server -w @sgs/web
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run build -w @sgs/desktop
scripts.installer:win: npm run build:desktop && npm run dist:win -w @sgs/desktop
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @sgs/game-server && npm run typecheck -w @sgs/game-server -w @sgs/web -w @sgs/desktop
